1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101010101 - ASI: 25

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 10 * 1
  0101 = 0 * 101
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01000 = 010 * 00
  10011 = 100 * 11
  000101 = 00 * 0101
  100100 = 100 * 100
  1010011 = 10 * 10011
  1010101 = 101 * 0101
  1111100 = 1111 * 100
  10011010 = 10011 * 010
  101100100 = 101 * 100100
  111101000 = 1111 * 01000
  01000111101000 = 01000 * 111101000
  10100111111100 = 1010011 * 1111100
  000101101100100 = 000101 * 101100100
  100110101010101 = 10011010 * 1010101
  1010011111110001000111101000 = 10100111111100 * 01000111101000
  000101101100100100110101010101 = 000101101100100 * 100110101010101
  1010011111110001000111101000000101101100100100110101010101 = 1010011111110001000111101000 * 000101101100100100110101010101
